title: selaginella wallichii
intro: Selaginella wallichii, also known as Spikemoss or Vairamudi, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, particularly in India, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella wallichii include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and respiratory issues.
